The powerline uses mains electricity to connect to the internet. One need simply connect the adaptor to an electrical socket, and it forms a LAN connection without the need to drill any holes in the wall. The devolo Magic 2 LAN Triple Starter Kit has an impressive length, giving you a reach of up to 500 m. Of course, the transfer speed largely depends on the stability of your mains network, but with this model it is usually around 2400 Mb/s. A pack contains 2 × adaptéru. The secondary unit of the DEVOLO powerline is designed with three LAN connectors. A big advantage is that the adaptors on this device are designed with a through-socket. You will thus still be able to connect other electronics. You'll be well aware of the status of your network, thanks to the signalling diodes.
